title: Project Manager - Integration & Solutions (Carbon Storage Well Construction)
summary: The I&S Project Manager for this project will be responsible for overall project delivery for a CO2 injection project, with focus on well construction and CO2 injection into the subsurface. The I&S Project Manager leads the overall projects performance. Is responsible for P&L and Service Delivery, to drive horizontal alignment across projects, functions, product lines and product companies. Managing the appropriate resource mix to enable service delivery excellence in the area. Monitoring KPI's for deviations and conducting project and rig performance assessments. Working in close collaboration with the various Onshore Service Managers and Service Delivery Technical managers within the region to drive; on-time delivery, consistency, and execution excellence, while maximizing the revenue, cost, and cash collection. Also works closely with the PL Service Delivery teams in the country to ensure clear communication and seamless resource planning across the projects.
tags: Carbon Capture and Storage | Project Manager
